legacy.descriptionHtml:
Thirtyfirst

First mix of 2013! There’s been a lot of good music that has been listened to while I was gone. Someone asked me to put a mix out today, so here it is.

Monday Music Mix: 31

Album art featuring work by Feline Zegers

Tracklist:

  1. A.C. Newman - I’m Not Talking
  2. Slam Donahue - Bug in the Sun
  3. Churchill - Change
  4. The Ampersands - Try This
  5. Tegan & Sara - Fool to Cry
  6. Hundred Waters - Me & Anodyne
  7. WhoMadeWho - Inside World
  8. The Vaccines - Aftershave Ocean
  9. Jenny Owen Youngs - Pirates
  10. Alt-J - Breezeblocks
  11. AlunaGeorge - Thinkin Bout You (Frank Ocean cover)
  12. Frank Ocean - Wise Man
  13. Rhye - The Fall
  14. Kids Without Instruments - Stardust
  15. Jeff Rosenstock - Twinkle
  16. The One AM Radio - In A City Without Seasons
  17. TV Girl - I Wonder Who She’s Kissing Now
  18. The Bloody Beetroots - Chronicles of a Fallen Love (feat. Greta Svabo Bech)
  19. The Weeknd - Enemy
  20. French Kiwi Juice - Lying Together
  21. Local Natives - Heavy Feet
  22. MØ - Pilgrim
  23. Sky Ferreira - Everything Is Embarrassing
  24. BJ Tran, Arct Tabanas, Gerald Fermin, & Jayne Baltazar - Erase Me (Kid Cudi cover)
  25. Free Energy - Girls Want Rock
  26. Sick Sad World - Alone All the Time (Leisure mix)
  27. Wild Ones - It’s Real
  28. Friends - Friend Crush
  29. WU LYF - Triumph
  30. Jordan Corey - Let Your Love Walk In (Paloma Faith cover)

* Tracks in blue indicate my favourites

Part 1 (1-15) | Part 2 (16-30)
legacy.favoriteTrackCue: * Tracks in blue indicate my favourites
